Pro Shop

Discover Your Swing!®

Palm Springs & Palm Desert

Tournament Performance Coaching

Christie Quinn specializes in preparing competitive golfers to thrive in tournament play. Whether you’re a junior golfer aiming for the leaderboards, a collegiate athlete seeking to sharpen your skills, or an amateur competitor chasing championship titles, Christie’s coaching is designed to help you perform your best when it matters most.

What Sets Christie Apart?

  • Tailored Coaching for Competitive Golf: Christie understands the unique demands of tournament golf, from mental toughness to technical precision. Her proven methods are designed to give you an edge in every aspect of your game.
  • A Track Record of Success: With years of experience coaching competitive players, Christie has helped golfers achieve personal bests, climb rankings, and win tournaments at all levels.
  • Data-Driven Improvement: Leveraging advanced tools and performance analytics, Christie provides actionable insights to help you make measurable progress.

Ready to Compete with Confidence?

Performance Playing Lesson

$200

On Course Golf Instruction For Performance

Get Started

Custom Programs

Christie offers custom coaching tailored to your schedule and goals. Contact her to design a program that fits your competitive needs.

Our Testimonials

What Students Say

Christie is fabulous with Jr Golfers!! My daughter developed her beautiful swing and love for golf with Christie. Christie has set her up for success in the sport with both solid skills and confidence. Highly recommend Christie to anyone looking for golf instruction!

Luara Y

Christie will customize your lesson to exactly what you need. i saw a positive change right away and also got the tools I needed to transfer my learning onto the golf course! Christie is an excellent golf coach.

Karen G

Christie is extremely knowledgable about her sport and is able to break it down for your specific type of learning style. I was able to see improvement in a very small amount of time with my driver and all irons! Feel like I have a pro to go to on my side now. Good golf to come!

Kelly H

content.rendered:
About Us

Discover Your Swing!®

Discover Your Swing!®

Our Philosophy

The essence of golf lies in the joy of striking the ball, hearing a friend say, “Nice shot,” and embracing the journey of improvement. While the pursuit of a better game is a lifelong challenge, the true secret to enjoying golf is learning to accept and work with the body you have today.

Discover Your Swing!® is my trademarked philosophy and unique approach to teaching the game. This method is designed to help every golfer uncover and embrace their own distinct swing. Just as no two people share the same level of strength or flexibility, no two swings are alike—they are as unique as a fingerprint. By understanding this, golfers can find fulfillment in their current abilities while being inspired to work toward their potential.

Your swing is waiting to be discovered. Let’s begin the journey!

DYS Founder & LPGA Vice President

Christie Quinn, LPGA

Christie Quinn is a Class A Member of the LPGA Teaching & Club Professional Division, and the current LPGA Vice President, with a passion for helping golfers of all levels discover and refine their unique swings. Growing up as an army brat, Christie lived across the U.S. and Europe before settling in Ponte Vedra Beach, Florida, where the proximity to TPC Sawgrass and the LPGA sparked her interest in golf.

While her early career was in retail and executive management, Christie’s love for golf grew through participation in charity and Pro-Am tournaments. In 2006, she made a bold career shift, dedicating herself fully to golf. Combining her competitive drive with a commitment to continuous improvement, Christie began competing in mini-tours, USGA events, and club tournaments, all while refining her skills with the guidance of top coaches and trainers.

Christie’s approach to golf instruction is rooted in her own journey of perseverance, learning, and goal-setting. With a repeatable push-draw swing she developed through observation and practice, she understands the importance of creating techniques that work under pressure. Her holistic philosophy integrates swing mechanics, physical fitness, and mental preparation, empowering golfers to reach their potential.

Based at Riverwalk Golf Performance Center in San Diego, CA, Christie is dedicated to helping golfers achieve their goals through personalized coaching, positivity, and a commitment to growth.

Contact Christie
📱 Text/Call: 508-330-6731
✉️ Email: quinn@discoveryourswing.com

A Roadmap for Golfers at Every Level

Discover Your Swing

Golf is a journey, and we’re here to guide you every step of the way. Our comprehensive player development programs combine technical expertise, fitness, and strategy to ensure your game continues to evolve. Whether you’re looking to improve your handicap or master specific areas of your game, we have a program for you.

Why Choose Discover Your Swing!?

  • Personalized coaching tailored to your unique goals
  • Access to world-class facilities in the beautiful Palm Springs area
  • Proven methods that deliver measurable results

Let’s discover your swing together!
